title: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal)
shortInfo: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website of MANIT Bhopal. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website of MANIT Bhopal. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: M.E./M. Tech in fields related to Electrical Engineering / Power Systems / Control Systems / Electronics / Power Electronics/ Communication / Computer Engineering or related fields OR B. Tech/B.E. in relevant discipline with Minimum CGPA 7.5/10 and Valid GATE qualification.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA per month for JRF; ₹42,000/- + HRA per month for SRF

selection_process: and suitability for the project Interview performance
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MANIT Bhopal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MANIT Bhopal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at MANIT Bhopal is June 2, 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.E./M. Tech in relevant fields of Electrical, Power Systems, Control Systems, Electronics, Power Electronics, Communication, or Computer Engineering. Alternatively, a B. Tech/B.E. with a minimum CGPA of 7.5/10 and a valid GATE qualification is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position is Rs. 37,000/- per month, plus HRA. For a Senior Research Fellow (SRF) position, the salary is Rs. 42,000/- per month, plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their academic credentials, relevant background, and suitability for the project. Final selection will be based on performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official MANIT Bhopal website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is ANRF/ARG/2025/007606/ENS. This number should be used for reference when applying or inquiring about the position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post in this recruitment drive by MANIT Bhopal.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position at MANIT Bhopal is a contractual job type. This means the employment is for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where is MANIT Bhopal located?
faq.answer: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh.
